subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! Thy letter hath arrived. Thy dear husband wisheth to complete his education and thou art eager to go to Africa.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی نامه رسید قرین عزیزت را مقصد تکمیل علومست و تو تعجیل در رفتن
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @consultation, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @effort; striving
